description_long: This object is a Dell Technologies computer monitor with a wide, flat display and a slim, modern profile. The front features a large, blue screen framed by a thin, black bezel, with the Dell Technologies logo prominently displayed at the center. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, rectangular silver stand with a vertical support column that has a circular cutout near the base. The rear of the monitor is matte black, with a Dell logo centered on the vertical support. The side views reveal the monitor's ultra-thin screen and the robust, angular design of the stand. No buttons or ports are visible on any side, giving the monitor a clean and minimalist appearance.
description: A sleek Dell Technologies computer monitor with a thin black bezel, wide blue display, and a sturdy silver stand. The design is modern and minimalist, with branding on both the front and rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide blue display, thin black bezel, and Dell Technologies logo at the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ultra-thin profile of the screen and the angular, silver stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte black back panel, vertical silver support with a circular cutout, and Dell logo on the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the slimness of the monitor and the robust, rectangular stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and flat with a matte finish, providing a minimal frame around the display. It has slightly rounded corners and no decorative elements, emphasizing a clean, modern look.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a flat, rectangular silver base with a vertical, rectangular support column featuring a circular cutout near the bottom. The design appears sturdy and modern, with no visible adjustability mechanisms.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
attribute_brand_logo: A Dell Technologies logo is centered on the front bezel below the screen, and a Dell logo is centered on the rear support column. Both are white and clearly visible against their respective backgrounds.
